title: Wang Tian Yu
content:
The Fourth Son of the Wang Clan. He lost his mother when he was young and was taken care by Wang Tian Shui's Mother.

In his youth, he wandered Jianghu (martial artist World) and build a strong relationship network that permit him to have power in the Wang Clan.

He, his nephews 
Wang Zhou
 and 
Wang Hao
, are the only survivors of the Wang Clan Massacre by 
Teng Huayuan
. Later, his descendant became the Zhao Country's official. He imposed a rule to take care of Wang Lin's Home as their Ancestral Home.

When he was middle aged, Wang Tian Yu caught the attention of an immortal of the Piao Miao sect. After he got off the mountain, he started his life in the capital and became one of the vassals of the royal family. That was also when the foundation of the Wang family started. He died at the age of 98. 

Descendant
[
]

Wang Zefu (Descendant) - Ch. 46 Donghua

Wang Lieyi (Descendant) - Ch. 46 Donghua
